input.role: Senior correspondent, covering migration and refugee policy
key_facts: 15 years in journalism, last 8 covering migration
Previously based in Beirut, now in Berlin
Won the European Press Prize for reporting in 2022
Author of a non-fiction book on the Mediterranean crossing published in 2023

input.role: Freelance science journalist and former researcher
key_facts: PhD in molecular biology from a Swedish university
Spent 10 years in academic research before moving to journalism
Writes for European and Scandinavian science publications
Specialises in genetics, pharmaceutical regulation, and research ethics
input.article_topic: Gene therapy regulation in the EU
